meta.title: I Built an AI Agent that Automates Your Business (No Code)
meta.description:
I Built an AI Agent that Automates Your Business (No Code)
Try Make for 1 month Free 👉 https://www.make.com/en/register?promo=dankieft&utm_source=dankieft&utm_medium=influencer&utm_campaign=dankieft-agents-release-april25

In this Make tutorial I show you how to build a personal assistant  AI Agent with no coding experience. This AI Agent can automate your entire business. Make has recently launched their ai agents to compete with n8n and in this video I am giving you a tutorial on how to use the ai agents. This workflow is pretty simple, but you can customize it entirely to tailer it to your business / life needs.

My Make checklist (copy this) 
https://docs.google.com/document/d/15Ak6w45lLDRK_ta4gq5EbQXGAqO-hEd-xQn0yKPDp0E/edit?usp=sharing


👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
